description: A logo featuring a circular graphic on the left, coloured in light green, with the text "Land" positioned to its right on the top line, and "Monitoring Service" on the bottom line. Both text lines are also in a light green colour. The circular graphic contains two stylised elements: a set of three vertical bars of increasing height, symbolising urban development or data trends, and a wheat stalk with individual grains, representing agriculture or natural landscapes. The entire logo is set against a white background. This logo is associated with the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS).
